titleStmt.title: SII 25.216: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 216. (A.R. No. 216 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the first prākāra of the Mantrapurīśvara temple.
This epigraph furnishes the details of date viz., Regnal year 2[8], Kumbha ba 6, Monday and Svāti-nakshatra corresponding to 1274 A.D., January 29, f.d.n. ·13.

It records the grant of 7(1/2) mā of lands, made after the purchase, from several persons, by the peruṅguṟi-mahāsabhai of Kēraḷakulāśaṉichchaturvēdimaṅgalam as iṟaiyili, to provide for the food-offerings and to meet the expenses of a festival (tirunāḷ-aḻivu) to the deity Tirujñāṉampeṟṟapiḷḷaiyār set up by Sembaṅkuḍaiyāṉ Tiruchchiṟṟambalam-uḍaiyaṉ Kūttāḍunāyaṉār, a merchant of Mummuḍiśōḻapuram. The image is stated to have been set up in the temple of Tiruvuśāttāṉam-uḍaiya-ṉāyaṉār of Uśāttāṉam alias Kēraḷakulāśaṉich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya in Puṟaṅkarambai-nāḍu in Rājēndraśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. Among the boundaries of the lands granted as iṟaiyili after purchase, the land of mā-kāṇi-mundirigaikkīḻaraiyē-iraṇḍu-mā-araikkāṇi is stated to have been surveyed as per the village measure in the 38th year of Periyadēvar Tribhuvanavīradēva.

Tribhuvanavīradēva is known to be the name of Kulōttuṅga III. Here he is attributed with the title Periyadēvar. Just as Rājarāja III stood in relation to Kulōttuṅga III, Rājēndra III too is related. The survey made in several places as referred to in the present record indicates not only the prosperous condition that prevailed but also the maintenance of the lands within his empire.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirupuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī rājentira coḻa tevarkku yāṇṭu 28āvatu kumpanāyaṟṟu Apara pakṣattu ṣaṣṭiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamai
peṟṟa cotināḷ rājentira coḻavaḷanāṭṭu puṟaṅkarampai nāṭṭu brahmadeyam tiruucāttāṉamāṉa keraḷa kulācaṉic caruppeti maṅkalattu Uṭaiyār
tiruvucāttāṉamuṭaiyanāyaṉār koyilil mummuṭi coḻapurattu viyāpārikaḷil cempaṅkuṭaiyāṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyan kūttāṭu nāyaṉār Eḻuntaruḷivitta
tiruñāṉam peṟṟa piḷḷaiyār Āticaṇṭeśvara tevakaṉ mikaḷukku Inta keraḷakulācaṉicaruppetimaṅkalattup peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyom Innāyaṉār koyil
Intac cempaṅkuṭaiyāṉ tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyāṉ kūttāṭu nāyaṉār Eḻuntaruḷivitta tiruñāṉam peṟṟa piḷḷaiyārkku Amutupaṭicāttuppaṭi kaṟi Amutu viñcaṉam Uḷḷiṭṭa
vaiyiṟkkum Innāyaṉār tirunāḷ Aḻivukaḷukkum nāṅkaḷ Iṟaiyiliceytu kuṭutta nilamāvatu Innāyaṉār śrīpaṇṭārattu niṉṟum piṟppaṭṭu kkalum vilai koṇṭa
pakkal vilaikoṇṭa periya tevar tiripuvaṉaviratevarkku [3 10 8] paṭi rūpāy � mukkāl mūṉṟumā ¿ 1muntiri kku kiḻpārkkellai nārācavarampukkut teṟkum
teṉpāṟkellai Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta nilattukku collappaṭṭa vāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Itaṉ tevatāṉa kāṇi piḷḷaiyāṉa Etirili coḻap pirammārāyar nilattukku (te)teṟkkum
Āka Icainta Ināṉkellai vuḷpaṭṭa rūpāy � ¿ kiḻakku Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta Ikkaṇṭattu nāṭuṭai nāyaka veḷāṉ rūpāy � kku kiḻpāṟkellai nārācavarampukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟk kellai Irāmpalūr Iḷai
ya tirunilakaṇṭa nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai kum vaṭapāṟkellai Innāyaṉārkku Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭutta nilattukku teṟkku Āka Icainta Innāṉkellaiyuḷpaṭṭa rūpāy � m Ivvāykkālum kaṇṭattu
vittap paṭṭaṉ pakkal paṭṭaṉ pakkal vilai koṇṭa rūpāy 1mā Itaṉ teṟkku Etirili coḻaṉ periyanampi paṭṭaṉ rūpāy (1/2) rūpāy ¿ 1muntiri kiḻakku rūpāy 1kāṇi mūṉṟumā 1kāṇi ¿ m Itaṉ teṟkku Irāmpalūr tūyacoti paṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭār pakkal vilaikoṇṭa rūpāy (1/2)
Itaṉ vilaikoṇṭa rūpāy mūṉṟumā ¿ 1muntiri kiḻakku mūṉṟumā 1kāṇi Āka Innilam muṉṟumā Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻaraiye Iraṇṭu mā kiḻpāṟkellai pūmcolai paṭṭa tāmotaravāykkālukku meṟkum teṉ
pāṟkellai tivucāttāṉamuṭaiya nāyaṉār tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai nārācavarampukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Irāmpalūr Iḷaiyatiruveṅkaṭa paṭṭaṉ nilattukku teṟkkum Āka Icainta Innāṉkellaikku Uḷppaṭṭa rūpāy 3 mā ¿ 1muntiri kiḻakku (1/2)2mā 1kāṇi
Iṉnāyaṉārkku Iṟaiyili kovinta paṭṭar pakkal vilaikoṇṭu periyatevar tiripuvaṉa viratevarkku 3 10 8 Ūr Aḷaviṉpaṭi Inilam mākāṇi muntirikaik kiḻaraiye Iraṇṭumā Araikkāṇikkum kiḻpāṟkellai
muṟcollappaṭṭa vāykkālukku ṉappiccar nilattukku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai nārācavarampukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkkellai Uṭaiyār tiruvucāttāṉamuṭaiya nāwritten below the line.yaṉār tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili nilattukku teṟkkum Āka Icainta Innāṉkellaikku Uḷpaṭa rūpāy 1mā 1kāṇi 1muntiri kiḻakku ¿
ṭa rūpāy ÿ rūpāy ḻumāvaraiyum Iṟaiyili ceytuk koṇṭa Uṭaiyār tiruvucāttāṉamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilil mummuṭicoḻapurattu viyāpārikaḷil cempaṅkuṭaiyāṉ tiruIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 25.216 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
